## what is vaginal dryness?

### CAUSES

The most common cause of vaginal area dryness is a decrease in estrogen production. And while this occurs mostly in women after menopause, when estrogen levels decline, there are many other times throughout a woman’s life when she will experience vaginal area dryness.

### WHEN IT HAPPENS

Women can also experience low estrogen levels from breastfeeding, taking contraceptive pills, undergoing a hysterectomy, during cancer treatment or due to certain medications. It’s a very common, but uncomfortable, condition.

### HOW IT HAPPENS

Low estrogen levels can result in drying, thinning and inflammation of the vaginal area tissue. This is called vaginal atrophy and can result in daily discomfort, painful intercourse and can also affect the urinary system.

### HOW IT’S TREATED

Vaginal area dryness and vaginal atrophy are often treated with estrogen therapy, which can have health risks and may not be suitable for everyone. Many alternatives like over the counter moisturizers offer only temporary comfort, which is why effective vaginal healthcare must include long lasting solutions created with science and sensitivity. Our vaginal healthcare approach and advanced vagiceutical care provide deeper comfort that truly supports long term wellbeing.
